description_long: This object is a large, flat, rectangular blade with a uniform, featureless surface and sharp, straight edges, resembling an oversized chef's knife or a sword with a minimalist design. The blade appears to be made entirely of metal, with no visible handle, guard, or decorative elements. Its proportions are broad and thin, with a subtle taper toward the center, suggesting a utilitarian or industrial purpose rather than a traditional kitchen or combat tool. The surface is smooth and matte, lacking any engravings, texturing, or color variation. There are no visible fasteners, rivets, or separations between blade and handle, indicating a monolithic construction. The overall appearance is stark and modern, with a focus on geometric simplicity and functionality.
description: A large, flat, rectangular metallic blade with sharp, straight edges and a smooth, featureless surface, lacking a visible handle or ornamentation.
description_view_0: The blade is seen edge-on, appearing as a thin, straight line with a slight central mark, emphasizing its flatness and sharpness.
description_view_1: The broad, flat face of the blade is visible, showing its rectangular shape and smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the blade is seen from the opposite edge, again highlighting its thin profile and central mark.
description_view_3: The flat face is visible from the reverse side, mirroring view 1 with the same smooth, rectangular appearance.
attribute_handle_design: none visible; monolithic blade with no separate handle
